create_option.description: Defines how the snapshot is created, with options such as 'Copy' or 'Import'; must be compatible with the source disk or data.

disk_access_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Disk Access resource to associate with the snapshot, enabling private endpoint connectivity.

disk_size_gb.description: Specifies the size of the snapshot in gigabytes; must be greater than or equal to the size of the source disk.

encryption_settings.description: Specifies the encryption configuration for the snapshot, including key source and identity requirements.
encryption_settings.type: list(object({enabled: optional(bool),disk_encryption_key: list(object({secret_url: string,source_vault_id: string})),key_encryption_key: list(object({key_url: string,source_vault_id: string}))}))

incremental_enabled.description: Specifies whether the snapshot is incremental; must be enabled for incremental snapshots.

name.description: Specifies the name of the snapshot, which must be unique within the resource group and adhere to Azure naming conventions.

network_access_policy.description: Defines the network access policy for the snapshot, specifying whether it is accessible over the internet or restricted to private networks.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Determines whether public network access is enabled for the snapshot; must be set to true or false.

source_resource_id.description: Specifies the ID of the source resource to create the snapshot from, such as a managed disk or another snapshot.

source_uri.description: Specifies the URI of the source disk or snapshot to create this snapshot from; must be a valid Azure resource URI.

storage_account_id.description: Specifies the ID of the storage account where the snapshot will be stored. Must be an existing Azure Storage account.

tags.description: Key-value pairs used to categorize and organize the snapshot for identification and management purposes.

timeouts.description: Defines the time duration for create, read, update, and delete operations, ensuring proper timeout management for resource actions.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
